contract.title: Enterprise Software License Agreement
contract.description: Perpetual software license agreement between SoftSys Inc and MegaCorp for enterprise analytics platform.
contract.governingLaw: This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the Commonwealth of Massachusetts.
contract.renewalTerms: Annual maintenance and support renews automatically unless canceled 60 days prior.

clauses.title: Grant of License
clauses.text: SoftSys grants MegaCorp a non-exclusive, non-transferable, perpetual license to use the Enterprise Analytics Platform for up to 500 named users. License is for internal business use only.

clauses.title: License Fee
clauses.text: MegaCorp shall pay a one-time license fee of $250,000 USD. Annual maintenance and support is $50,000, payable in advance.

clauses.title: Maintenance and Support
clauses.text: SoftSys shall provide standard maintenance and support including bug fixes, security patches, and email/phone support during business hours with a 4-hour response SLA for critical issues.

clauses.title: Usage Restrictions
clauses.text: MegaCorp shall not (a) sublicense, sell, or distribute the software; (b) reverse engineer or modify the software; (c) exceed the licensed user count; (d) use the software for third-party benefit or as a service bureau.

clauses.title: Audit Rights
clauses.text: SoftSys may audit MegaCorp's usage upon 10 days notice, not more than once per year. If audit reveals under-licensing, MegaCorp shall pay the shortfall plus 15% penalty.

clauses.title: Warranty and Disclaimer
clauses.text: SoftSys warrants the software will substantially conform to documentation for 90 days. ALL OTHER WARRANTIES ARE DISCLAIMED, INCLUDING IMPLIED WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY AND FITNESS.

clauses.title: Limitation of Liability
clauses.text: Neither party's total liability shall exceed the license fees paid in the 12 months preceding the claim. Neither party shall be liable for indirect, consequential, or lost profits damages.

clauses.title: Term and Termination
clauses.text: The license is perpetual. Maintenance is annual. Either party may terminate for material breach uncured within 30 days. Upon termination of maintenance, the perpetual license survives.

obligations.description: Grant non-exclusive, perpetual license for 500 users.
Pay $50,000 annual maintenance and support fee.
Provide standard support with 4-hour SLA for critical issues.
Not sublicense, sell, reverse engineer, or exceed licensed user count.
Submit to audit upon 10 days notice, pay shortfall plus 15% if under-licensed.
Ensure software substantially conforms to documentation for 90 days.

terms.label: license fee
terms.description: Perpetual license fee for Enterprise Analytics Platform.

risks.description: Warranty is only 90 days and disclaims all implied warranties, leaving MegaCorp with limited recourse for software defects.
risks.impact: MegaCorp bears the risk of software defects after 90 days; no remedy for non-conforming software beyond limited period.

risks.description: Liability cap at fees paid in preceding 12 months may be insufficient for data breach or IP infringement scenarios.
risks.impact: MegaCorp's recovery capped at $250,000 even if data loss or IP infringement causes substantial damages.

risks.description: Audit penalty of 15% on shortfall is relatively low, which may encourage SoftSys to use audits proactively.
risks.impact: SoftSys has incentive to audit; 15% penalty is below market standard of 20-30%.

risks.description: No data protection or indemnification clause for third-party IP claims.
risks.impact: MegaCorp has no contractual protection if the software infringes third-party IP or if SoftSys mishandles MegaCorp's data.

definitions.definition: SoftSys's proprietary business intelligence and analytics software as described in the Documentation.
The user manuals, technical specifications, and other documentation provided by SoftSys with the software.
